register.title: Create New Account
register.subtitle: Sign up quickly and experience the smart medical assistant
register.mrrnPlaceholder: Enter your hospital MRN if you have one
register.heroTitle: The First Step to Smart Care
register.heroLine1: Join our system and experience precise care and an efficient consultation process.
register.heroLine2: Your health records will be kept fully protected.
register.failed: Registration failed. Please try again later.

password.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
password.needUppercase: Password must contain an uppercase letter
password.needLowercase: Password must contain a lowercase letter
password.hint: At least 8 characters, with upper/lowercase and a digit
password.mismatch: Password and confirmation do not match

forgot.title: Forgot Password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we will send you a password reset link
forgot.failed: Failed to send reset link. Please try again later.
forgot.sentSuffix: and follow the instructions in the email to reset your password.

reset.title: Reset Password
reset.subtitle: Please enter your new password
reset.invalidToken: The reset link is invalid or expired. Please request a new one.
reset.failed: Failed to reset password. Please check the link is valid or try again later.
reset.doneMessage: Your password has been updated. Please log in with your new password.
